_comment: grill-adapter plugin MCP servers. Auto-started when the plugin is enabled — no `claude mcp add-json` step. Scope follows the plugin's install scope (`claude plugin install grill-adapter --scope project|user`); a plugin-bundled server cannot be scoped independently. The server self-configures per project by reading CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR -> <project>/.shared-adapter/settings.json -> wiki.sharedMcp, and fails closed when that is absent. Tools are namespaced mcp__plugin_grill-adapter_shared-wiki__*.
